LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-11-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-21-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, AMENDED COMPLAINT MUST BE FILED NOT LATER THAN AUGUST 31, 2020. PLAINTIFFS ARE REPRESENTING THEMSELVES, AND ARE URGED TO SECURE A LAWYER. THEY SHOULD CORRECTLY AND COMPLETELY FILL OUT THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORMS USED FOR THE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFFS MUST ADDRESS THE APPARENT ONE YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS: IT MAY BE THAT THE CASE HAD TO BE FILED WITHIN 1 YEAR OF APRIL 2017, THAT IS, BY APRIL 4, 2018. IF THERE IS SOME REASON WHY THAT ONE YEAR PERIOD DOES NOT APPLY, FACTS TO SUPPORT THAT SHOULD BE IN THE NEXT COMPLAINT. FACTS MUST BE STATED AS TO WHY EACH DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E KARNOW, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/CEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend, amended complaint must be filed not later than August 31, 2020. Plaintiffs are representing themselves, and are urged to secure a lawyer. They should correctly and completely fill out the judicial council forms used for the complaint. Plaintiffs must address the apparent one year statute of limitations: it may be that the case had to be filed within 1 year of April 2017, that is, by April 4, 2018. If there is some reason why that one year period does not apply, facts to support that should be in the next complaint. Facts must be stated as to why each defendant is responsible.

order signed.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)
